policy.launchUse: Only project-owned local assets should be referenced by the public launch UI.
policy.humanReview: New generated media must be reviewed for brand fit, medical-claim safety, and absence of watermarks or third-party marks before publication.

assets.generationWorkflow: OpenAI Image Gen 2 project workflow; generated as a project-bound raster asset during the Herbalisti build.
assets.promptSummary: Light, airy future wellness observatory with Japanese Zen restraint, botanical intelligence, translucent glass, DNA/peptide light patterns, and warm white atmosphere.
assets.usageRightsNote: Project launch asset for Herbalisti. No stock-photo, third-party brand, readable medical claim, people, pills, syringes, or pharmaceutical packaging intentionally included.

assets.generationWorkflow: OpenAI Image Gen 2 project workflow; generated as a project-bound raster asset during the Herbalisti build.
assets.promptSummary: Future-facing research reading room with botanical reference cues, glass data interfaces, DNA/CRISPR/peptide signal motifs, and spacious Zen composition.
assets.usageRightsNote: Project launch asset for Herbalisti. No stock-photo, third-party brand, readable medical claim, people, pills, syringes, or pharmaceutical packaging intentionally included.

assets.generationWorkflow: Supplied by Marc during Herbalisti review and stored as a local project reference asset.
assets.promptSummary: Light Herbalisti composition with spacious copy area, soft grid, and botanical intelligence atmosphere.
assets.usageRightsNote: User-supplied project reference asset. The active home hero uses the OpenAI-generated hero image; confirm rights before public production if this reference asset is reintroduced.

assets.generationWorkflow: Built as original vector code for Herbalisti.
assets.promptSummary: Titanium contemporary monoline botanical wordmark for herbalisti with no separate icon.

assets.generationWorkflow: Built as original vector code for Herbalisti.
assets.promptSummary: Titanium typographic monogram for favicon, app icon, and small UI surfaces.

futureMedia.seedance: Seedance 2.0 video loops should be generated through Kie.ai only after KIE_API_KEY, MEDIA_ADMIN_TOKEN, credits, R2 storage, and review workflow are ready.
futureMedia.openaiServerSide: OPENAI_API_KEY is only needed if repeatable server-side image generation is added later.
